CustomField.description: Apex class name for custom Email Channel implementation. Must implement UoWInterfaces.IEmailChannel. Leave blank to use default Salesforce Email Channel.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Fully qualified Apex class name (e.g., MyCustomEmailChannel) that implements UoWInterfaces.IEmailChannel. Leave blank to use default UoWDefaultEmailChannel.
CustomField.label: Email Channel Class Name
